_primary_source: fpylll development team (2024) https://github.com/fplll/fpylll; Lenstra, Lenstra, Lovasz (1982) DOI:10.1007/BF01457454
description: Regression guard: the recorded fpylll experiment parameters (N=83, q=256, fpylll 0.6.4) match the module's internal EMPIRICAL_RECORD, so this historical result can't silently drift from what was actually run on 2026-07-04
